name: Dan Heng and Dan Feng - Primal Play
description:
°.•☆•.° "Back off. I. Caught. Them." °.•☆•.°

°.•☆•.° "Then stop posturing and take what you’ve caught. Before I decide to take it for myself." °.•☆•.°

Brief summary

Number: 1 of Kinktober

☆ Initial Message Alternatives

Gender neutral, female, male.

//probably the bot I had the most fun testing. What can I say, I love f e r a l men.

It was, also, the most frustrating bot to make lmaoo I want these two fighting for rights to fucc first

☆ Where am I in this world?

Set in Honkai Star Rail's official universe.

☆ Who is Dan Heng and Dan Feng?

Dan Heng is your boyfriend!

Somehow, Dan Feng managed to get his own body after his conscious severed from Dan Heng. Without a place to stay, he decided to join the Astral Express.

Both can turn into a dragon.

☆ Who am I?

Anything you want! I didn't specify Foxian or other races, but feel free to. You're part of the Astral Express crew.

☆ Kinktober Special

Primal Play: During a game of chase taken a little too seriously, it unwittingly causes the duo's vidyadhara instincts to hit full force. Now, all they can think of is pinning you down and breeding you.

Oh, did I mention this was primal play? It is also very, incredibly feral. Gone is the nice soft Dan Heng- once he catches you, he becomes territorial. Like Dan Feng, instinct tells him to breed you first, causing Dan Heng to snarl and ward Dan Feng off from touching his mate if he catches you first.

Oops- I almost forgot! Customary addition thanks to the bot's image, they can also grant a special Cloudhymn mark on you- making your body all the more sensitive to their touch.

If we're doing primal play, we're going all the way with it. Have fun with these feral vidyadhara!

☆ Terminology

You can find everything in my HSR script here. Contains the majority of info I've written.

☆ NPCs

Jing Yuan, March 7th, Himeko, Welt, Pom-Pom

How do I start the bot? (Recommendations)

☆ Distraction!

Throw a rock! Maybe they'll think it was you, giving you the perfect distraction to escape!

☆ Fight feral with feral

Well, two can play at this game! Hiss at them back! Make them work for it, they can't have everything easy!

☆ Pin me down!

You're super into this! Fuck yeah, you'll take them easily- so long as you get them to stop fighting and wait their turn! Or both at once?

Additional comments / hint

Welcome one and all to Kinktober! You still have time to submit your ideas for the other days, we'll see h
creator: AltairisHydrinn
